name: Old West Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown pork chops in vegetable stock. Remove and refrigerate.
2. Brown onion slices on both sides. Remove and refrigerate.
3. Cook chili powder for 2 minutes, then add the remaining ingredients (rice, tomato sauce, water, and salt).
4. Pour the mixture into a casserole dish. Place the pork chops on top of the rice and put a slice of onion on each pork chop. Cover.
5. Bake for 1-1 1/2 hours in an oven preheated to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
